tiles.text: She's our friend and she's crazy!

groups.name: Stranger Things Universe
groups.explanation: Hawkins, Indiana (location), The Upside Down (location), Millie Bobby Brown (actress), and 'She's our friend and she's crazy!' (quote from Dustin) are all from Stranger Things.

groups.name: Shows Set in Rural America with Brooding Antiheroes
groups.explanation: Yellowstone (Paramount Network), Ozark (Netflix), Justified (FX), and Rectify (SundanceTV) are all critically acclaimed dramas set in rural or small-town America featuring morally complex male protagonists — a trap group that looks thematic but the real connection is they are all antihero-led prestige dramas that premiered in different decades and networks, making players second-guess every angle.

groups.name: Fictional Small Towns from TV
groups.explanation: Dillon, Texas (Friday Night Lights), Greendale (Community), Schitt's Creek (Schitt's Creek), and Pawnee (Parks and Recreation) are all fictional towns that serve as the primary setting of their respective TV shows.

groups.name: Fan-Saved Shows Revived After Cancellation
groups.explanation: Cabot Cove (Murder, She Wrote — revived via syndication fan pressure), The OA (Netflix cancellation sparked massive fan protest including a sit-in at Netflix HQ), Sense8 (Netflix cancelled then brought back for a finale movie after fan campaign), and Jericho (CBS cancelled then renewed after fans mailed peanuts in protest) were all shows whose passionate fan bases fought — with varying success — to bring them back after cancellation.
